feed.title: SAP Community - PLM EAM/Plant Maintenance
feed.subtitle: PLM EAM/Plant Maintenance Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: PM Master Data ( Equipment ) Upload in S4 Hana
entry.content:
Hi All, 

Greetings !

What are the tools available to upload master data in S4 Hana ?  Can anyone please suggest step by step process with screen shot to upload Equipment master data in S4 Hana system .  Also is there any standard tool available to upload transaction data for cut over activity ?

Thanking you .

Best Regards 

Mohammed

entry.title: Service tab is not available in maintenance order
entry.content:
Hello experts,

We are currently implementing SAP S/4HANA Private Edition, and while testing best practices (client 050), we were able to create corrective maintenance orders (YBA1). In the Operations tab, we could add a service for external operations, as shown in the image below:

However, when testing with our own data in a different client, the Services tab is not appearing, even though we are using the same order type.

Does anyone know why this might be happening? Could it be due to a missing configuration, or could it be related to roles or authorizations?

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: PM Data Migration from ECC to S4 Hana
entry.content:
Hi All, 

Greetings for the day !

I have a requirement related to data migration from ECC server to a completely new S4 Hana server . Client wants to scrap ECC server & want to go completely new implementation on S4 Hana 2023 version with new server . In light of this , what are the options available to migrate all PM & PS data ( master data , transactional data , historical data ) from ECC server to S4 hana Server ? Please throw some light on these .

Thanks & Kind Regards 

Mohammed

entry.title: Tables for historical changes of PM Task Lists
entry.content:
hi there

can anyone help me to find out when and who removed the operation from task list? there is an MP which has a task list attached; however the task list operation has been removed, therefore the MP which was supposed to be called on July 22nd, 2024 is on hold. 

I added new operation on 08AUG2024 as shown in screenshot#1 and SAP generated new node and counter in table PLPO, can anyone tell me how I can find missing node 1 ?!

screenshot#1

then operation 20 has been deleted (as created in error) which updated deletion indicator in table PLAS in screenshot#2.

any thought, solution?!

#PLM Enterprise Asset Management (EAM)/Plant Maintenance (PM) 

@Amin_Omidy 

kind regards,

Mary

entry.title: Fiori app Report Malfunction configuration error IX007 Partner VW not allowed
entry.content:
I have been trying to configure the Report Malfunction Fiori app and have come across this error when the notification is saved.

Partner function VW is not allowed in partner determination profile PM

I have check the PM profile and Partner VW is not assigned to this profile. We have a Z Partner set up for this profile under Plant Maintenance>Master Data in Plant Maintenance>Basic Settings>Partners>Define Partner Determination Procedure and Partner function. 

Can anyone please point me in the right direction in configuration where I can resolve this error because the SAP Help is very light on.

entry.title: Translation of Object Type
entry.content:
Hello, guys! Please, do you know how to check if SAP has option to maintain translation of Technical Object Type. Where can I check it, please?

For example, I have a list of Object Type in English and I'd like the same list in Portuguese, according to the logon language.

entry.title: Possibility to connect multiple maintenance orders to a service order
entry.content:
Hi All,

In SAP S/4Hana Service I am trying to test a scenario of creating multiple maintenance orders (either copy, follow-up or a sub order) against a service product in a service order wherein I want to see the parent service order linkage to all those multiple maintenance orders created. 

Please help me understand where we could see that reference of parent service order. I have checked in the document flow and also in AFIH table, did not get it.

 

Thanks a lot!

entry.title: Calculation tool for maintenance plans
entry.content:
Hello experts,

i have a question: I need a tool that shows us the future costs of our maintenance plans. IP19, for example, goes in the right direction, but unfortunately there is no option to create the costs there

I know transactions IP31 and IP17/IP18 that can show costs, but they only show the resource that is specified in the Task Lists. and I need to see the costs for each Maintenance plan.

 

Thank you

entry.title: Converting CS Notifications Category to PM Notification Category
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Customer Service (CS) will be replaced by S/4HANA Service (SAP Note 2269324).

For the foreseeable future we plan to use PM instead of S/4HANA Service. To this extend we would like to retain the current Notification Types as we have a large volume of history and custom enhancements based on the current Notification types. 

While it is possible to change existing CS Order Types to PM Order Types, it is not possible to do the same with CS Notifications. (Changing the Notification Category from "03" to "01")

We recognise it is not a simple change as there are many dependent tables using the Notification Category, but other customers must be facing the same issue. 

So the question is: Does other customers plan to switch existing CS Notification Types to PM Notification Types, and if so, how do you plan to achieve this?

Appreciate any help and guidance.

entry.title: Automatic approval for maintenance orders workflow is not working
entry.content:
Hi,

I created a reactive maintenance order, and according to the best practice for reactive maintenance (Reactive Maintenance (4HH_US)), we should be able to start a flexible workflow for approval. I sent the order, but it never reaches my inbox or gets approved. I can see the order in the Fiori application, and under the authorization status, I see that the automatic workflow has the order, but it’s been days, and it hasn’t been approved or rejected:

I thought the automatic approval workflow would approve the order instantly.

Does anyone know why this might be happening? Could it be due to a missing configuration? Is there a way to release this order from the current workflow to continue with the proces?

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: EAM - Network Graphics Issue in Work Order and Task List
entry.content:
I am looking for some guidance from clients or SAP on how to resolve the network graphics issue (known issue by SAP). In Fiori, the graphics is not supported for HTML and it's marked as a known issue by SAP, this impacts to our users in work order and task list management.  This is currently a blocker for us to move our EAM users from GUI to Fiori. And I would like to hear from other clients or SAP on the recommended practice. Thank you!

 

 

SAP EAM Work Order PLM Enterprise Asset Management (EAM)/Plant Maintenance (PM)

entry.title: EAM - Network Graphics Issue in Work Order and Task List
entry.content:
I am looking for some guidance from clients or SAP on how to resolve the network graphics issue (known issue by SAP). In Fiori, the graphics is not supported for HTML and it's marked as a known issue by SAP, this impacts to our users in work order and task list management.  This is currently a blocker for us to move our EAM users from GUI to Fiori. And I would like to hear from other clients or SAP on the recommended practice. Thank you!

 

 

 

 

PLM Enterprise Asset Management (EAM)/Plant Maintenance (PM) SAP EAM Work Order

entry.title: Notification on SAP PM
entry.content:
Dear Frinds 

I make a user status PENDING for notification 

Is There is any way to cassify our pending reasons as a list  to be used for reporting such as 

1- Need Complete shutdown

2- need Partial shutdown

and so on

entry.title: FM to assign existing maintenance items to a dummy maintenance plan
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm currently starting to archive the maintenance plans, but there are bigger numbers of maintenance items that does not have a plan. By SAP's advice, a dummy plan should be assigned to these items so it can be archived.

I tried testing the existing FMs like to no avail:

  • MPLAN_READ
  • MPLAN_ITEM_READ
  • MPLAN_CHANGE
  • MPLAN_ITEM_CHANGE

I also tested MCH01, but its also not working.

entry.title: MRS, Work Manager & Asset Manager
entry.content:
Hi All, 

Greetings !

Can anyone please explain usage of MRS, Work Manager & Asset Manager ? Are they same in S4 Hana ?

Thanking you .

Best Regards 

Mohammed

entry.title: Couldn't choose user status profile in Create Technical Object app
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I would like to assign user status profile and set the status manually in Create/Change technical object. But the field is read only even though I have given the "Maintenance planner" role. In addition, maybe related with this business catalog, EAM - Technical Object (SAP_EAM_BC_TO_MC). I couldn't also see this catalog as well in the system. Please guide me how I can define the status profile. Please kindly see the attachment also.

 

Thanks for your advice.

 

Best Regards,

Phoo

entry.title: What types of resources do you need for SAP EAM implementation?
entry.content:
What type of resources do you need for an EAM implementation?

1. Functional

2. Technical

entry.title: Display a picture of the equipment in IE02/IE03
entry.content:
Hello,

We need in the equipment master IE01, IE02 and IE03 to display a picture of the equipment. The picture should be displayed directly in a section of the screen without user intervention (no mouse clicks or other commands). For this purpose a document was created with CV01N and pictures where uploaded in it. The document was linked to the equipment. The first picture from the attached ones should be displayed.

We tried to make the settings like in the note 1821916 but the result is disappointing. The picture is displayed just in transaction CV02N or CV03N and is a very small thumbnail. No picture is displayed in IE02 or IE03.

Does any of you have an idea how to achieve what we need? Did somebody programed something similar?

Mihai

entry.title: Work Permit / WCM in SAP S4 Hana EAM
entry.content:
Hi All , 

Greetings !

Can you any one please throw some light on work permit /wcm process in SAP S4 Hana EAM module .

Thanking you .

Mohammed

entry.title: Resource scheduling app- Order operation is confirmed but in scheduling still showing not completed
entry.content:
Hi 

In Scheduling its showing "not completed" & " Completion in Addition"  even after order operation confirmation done. 

Scheduling is done between 18-08-2024 & 24-08-2024, Confirmation is done on 21-08-2024 , 

 

 S/4 HANA 2021 . 

Is this issue is due to finish end date 25-08-2024 ?
